ConstructorArguments: Update the animation for this renderer. This will update the body rotation etc too.

Documentation.Summary: Update the animation for this renderer. This will update the body rotation etc too.

ConstructorArguments: Adds velocity in a special way. First we subtract any opposite velocity (ie, falling) then we add the velocity, but we clamp it to that direction. This means that if you jump when you're running up a platform, you don't get extra jump power.

Documentation.Summary:
Adds velocity in a special way. First we subtract any opposite velocity (ie, falling) then 
we add the velocity, but we clamp it to that direction. This means that if you jump when you're running
up a platform, you don't get extra jump power.
